commit.subject: Rename binary and config paths to pgbunker.
Update display text in help and main doc page.
Render <backrest/> doc tag via PROJECT_NAME macro.
Set version to 2.59.0-bunker.1 for the first pgBunker tag.
Refresh project tagline and intro to signal pgBunker identity.
Point repo URLs at pgbunker org after transfer.
Run CI on main and update binary path for fork rename.

release-item.p: Initial fork release. Renames the binary, default config and data paths from pgbackrest to pgbunker, refreshes user-facing documentation, and establishes the org / website at pgbunker/pgbunker. Honors the upstream maintainer's request that forks adopt a new identity. Existing pgBackRest deployments can upgrade in place: the on-disk repository format is unchanged and /etc/pgbackrest/pgbackrest.conf is read as a fallback when the new config is absent.
